my_thoughts: Need to normalize the method: contradictions surface preexisting clashes. Expect a clarifying question; if not, restate the aim plainly.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student accuses (?You twist everything?first forcing Gorgias to contradict himself, and now Polus?)?resist_intellectually via accuses_method. They understand: feel manipulated. Recursion_loop/ME_03 will show contradiction arises from their own commitments. Pattern: accusation ? method explanation queued. Confidence medium because meta-clarification often draws a ?how??
visible_response: It is better for the many to contradict me than for me to contradict myself, though I am only one person.
